candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line at the top of the income statement; preferred over the duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; valid fallback label if needed.
COGS, not revenue.
COGS, not revenue.
COGS, not revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use Sales as primary revenue line; Total Revenue is a duplicate fallback label.

candidates.why: Standard COGS/cost of sales line directly under revenue; best match.
Equivalent COGS label with identical values; valid fallback.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct income statement COGS labels; excluded balance-sheet inventory row.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-style row, but mostly only populated in 2021; include for coverage per hierarchy rule.
Clear SG&A component above EBIT.
Clear SG&A component above EBIT.
Dedicated R&D line above EBIT; include in XSGA as well when separately reported so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Closest additional overhead bucket above EBIT; helps coverage where explicit SG&A row is sparse.
Could overlap with selling/admin expenses and appears more like supplementary disclosure than a clean SG&A line.
R&D label exists but appears unpopulated in preview; less preferable than the explicit populated R&D line.
SG&A amortization-related supplemental line; excluded because D&A/amortization should not be part of XSGA components here.
Depreciation-related supplemental line; excluded from XSGA components.
Balance-sheet liability, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Included the sparse explicit SG&A row plus overhead component buckets per the hierarchy rule. Included R&D in XSGA because it is separately reported above EBIT and not clearly embedded in the selected buckets; later XSGA-XRD will remove it. Excluded D&A/amortization rows and totals.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match.
R&D-related D&A component, but XRD should capture the dedicated R&D expense line rather than depreciation/amortization subcomponent.
R&D label exists but appears unpopulated in preview; less preferable than the explicit populated line.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT. It is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so XSGA-XRD removes it appropriately.

candidates.why: Broader interest expense total; valid fallback if the more specific line is unavailable in some years.
Most specific core interest expense line; preferred primary mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest subcomponent, not preferred as the main XINT if broader interest expense exists.
Too broad; includes non-interest finance costs.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest subcomponent, not preferred main XINT.
Balance-sheet accrual, not the income statement interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the more specific Interest Expense first, then the broader Interest Expenses as fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of earnings, not balance-sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity investments at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: OCI investment item, not book equity.
Income statement/earnings-related item, not balance-sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity investments at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: Asset/investment line, not equity.
Component of equity, but not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Fair value reserves from equity investments
candidates.why: Component of equity, but not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interests.
Valid fallback only if owner/parent equity were unavailable; here it equals parent equity because NCI appears absent.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting MIB. Total equity included only as fallback since non-controlling interests appear absent.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution label appears blank; not the preferred balance-sheet minority-interest stock item.
Income statement attribution label appears blank; not the preferred balance-sheet minority-interest stock item.
Correct label conceptually, but appears blank across preview years, suggesting no reported NCI.
Correct label conceptually, but appears blank across preview years, suggesting no reported minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance-sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest/minority interest amounts are reported in the preview; use empty mapping so MIB is treated as 0.
